items.title: S01E01 - Episode 1
items.summary: A love story about two people who appear to be utterly wrong for each other, but may be entirely right, begins.

infolabels.title: Episode 1
infolabels.plot: A love story about two people who appear to be utterly wrong for each other, but may be entirely right, begins.

items.title: S01E02 - Episode 2
items.summary: Seamus and Janet meet in Belfast and, after a glorious night of laughter and sexual tension, Janet makes a shocking suggestion.

infolabels.title: Episode 2
infolabels.plot: Seamus and Janet meet in Belfast and, after a glorious night of laughter and sexual tension, Janet makes a shocking suggestion.

items.title: S01E03 - Episode 3
items.summary: Seamus' girlfriend whisks him away for the night and drags Janet along, too. An agonising night of lies and subterfuge ensues.

infolabels.title: Episode 3
infolabels.plot: Seamus' girlfriend whisks him away for the night and drags Janet along, too. An agonising night of lies and subterfuge ensues.

items.title: S01E04 - Episode 4
items.summary: At last, the day has come: the affair is on! But when they realise they've both 'caught feelings', things take a different turn.

infolabels.title: Episode 4
infolabels.plot: At last, the day has come: the affair is on! But when they realise they've both 'caught feelings', things take a different turn.

items.title: S01E05 - Episode 5
items.summary: Janet visits London to be with Seamus and have some touristy fun. But it's clear the lovers are keeping secrets from each other.

infolabels.title: Episode 5
infolabels.plot: Janet visits London to be with Seamus and have some touristy fun. But it's clear the lovers are keeping secrets from each other.

items.title: S01E06 - Episode 6
items.summary: It's over between Janet and Seamus, but Janet's boss urges her not to give up. Can they find a way back to each other?

infolabels.title: Episode 6
infolabels.plot: It's over between Janet and Seamus, but Janet's boss urges her not to give up. Can they find a way back to each other?
